name: ToriDori 2
short_description: TORIDORI 2 is the wonderful world of a photographer who is able to capture his dreams in the photo, but he can only take 2 shots per dream. The differences of some details will be the difference between these two shots. Carefully explore every corner and enjoy the game.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the fascinating world of a photographer's dreams, which he is able to capture in a photo but only two frames per dream. But here's the mystery - these two shots are different from each other! Your task is to help the photographer remember exactly what his dream was by finding all the differences between the two shots.
Our photographer has a rich creative imagination and thanks to all this his dreams become unique and varied, reflecting the most unusual and fascinating subjects. Thanks to your skills of observation, you will be able to reconstruct the full picture of his memories, the shot will take on its true form and he will be able to hang it with the rest of the photos. Immerse yourself in this exciting adventure and enjoy the fascinating search for what is hidden in the collection of 40 of his dreams)

Game Features:
Find the differences.
40 dioramas with different storyline.
Upon completion of the task, you can take a closer look at the presented landscape.
There is a hint system.
Relaxing music will soothe and immerse you in the game.
Advanced graphics settings will help you find a balance of quality and performance.
Flexible difference display settings.
Cats.
